Marcus Feldman
Real Estate Acquisitions Analyst, New York, NY
marcus.feldman@example.com | 555-201-3006 | linkedin.com/in/marcus-feldman

SUMMARY
Commercial real estate professional with 4 years in acquisitions and asset
management for a NYC-based investment firm. Skilled in underwriting, financial
modeling, and due diligence across office, multifamily, and retail assets.

EXPERIENCE
Acquisitions Analyst — Hudson Realty Capital (2021–present)
- Underwrote commercial real estate acquisitions totaling over $600M, building
  pro forma cash-flow models and cap-rate sensitivity analyses in ARGUS and Excel.
- Performed due diligence on multifamily and office assets, reviewing leases,
  rent rolls, and operating statements.
- Supported asset management by tracking property performance and leasing activity
  across a 2.5M-square-foot portfolio.

Real Estate Analyst — Metro Property Group (2019–2021)
- Built valuation models and market studies for development and brokerage deals;
  assisted with tenant leasing and acquisitions pipeline tracking.

SKILLS
Commercial real estate, acquisitions, underwriting, ARGUS, pro forma, cap rate,
financial modeling, due diligence, asset management, leasing, valuation, rent
roll, multifamily, property management, development

EDUCATION
B.S. Real Estate & Finance, New York University, 2019
